# Swarmlabs - Virtual Experiment Platform

> 145 AI-driven virtual experiment engines with 7550+ real paper validations. 
> Physics-based modeling with 99.6% real data coverage. 5 research skills + 5 marketing skills.
> Cost-effective alternative to traditional experiments: 10,000+ conditions/second at $0 marginal cost.

## Core Products
- [Virtual Experiment Engines](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/engines.html): 145 engines across 22 physics categories
- [Research Skills](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/research-skills.html): PaperSpine, Citation Verify, Stats Sanity, Literature Survey, Scientific Writing
- [Marketing Skills](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/marketing-skills.html): GrowthPulse, SEOPulse, ContentForge, CompetitorRadar, LaunchKit
- [Paper Generator](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/paper-generator.html): SCI paper material generation with real validation data
- [API Playground](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/api-playground.html): Try all engines via REST API

## Key Metrics
- 145 virtual experiment engines
- 7,550 validation datasets
- 99.6% real paper citations
- 100% engines with <15% error
- 22 physics categories
- Mean prediction error: 4.6%

## API
- Base URL: http://localhost:8461/api/v1
- Endpoints: /run/{engine}, /optimize/{engine}, /validate/{engine}
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/lm203688/swarmlabs)
- [Documentation](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/docs.html)
- [About](https://swarmlabs.pages.dev/about.html)
